_comment: Detector hits that are NOT owner instance-facts and are acceptable to ship as-is. Four groups: (1) vendored Quartz strings; (2) institution names + already-fake examples in illustrative skill text; (3) generic example content; (4) vendored res.sty LaTeX-class author credits (Michael DeCorte's 1988/1989 addresses incl. one BITNET-style %-routed address). NOTE for distribution: the pi-pack/CV items were genericized before any third-party distribution per the spec §5 privacy-as-failsafe pre-distribution gate.
